forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.instructions: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

verifyEmail.successBody: Your email address has been verified.
verifyEmail.failureBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

WorkspaceForm.name: Name
WorkspaceForm.timezoneHint: This workspace's business timezone — used to decide what "today" is and to record accurate start/end times, independent of your own device's timezone.
WorkspaceForm.hourlyWageHint: Enter your rate exactly as agreed with the client, then say below whether it already includes tax.
WorkspaceForm.taxIncluded: Tax included in the rate above
WorkspaceForm.inclTaxHint: The tax-included figure is what's used everywhere else in the app (records, totals).

TaxExport.title: Tax export
TaxExport.description: Export this workspace's annual income summary for your accountant or accounting software.
TaxExport.upsell: Tax export is a Pro feature. Upgrade to Pro on the Settings page to export your annual summary.

hero.title: Get paid, track hours, and breeze through tax season.
hero.subtitle: Perfmate tracks time and wages by client, then exports a ready-to-file income summary for freee, MFクラウド確定申告, or your accountant — built for freelancers in Japan.

problem.title: Tax season shouldn't mean digging through spreadsheets
problem.body: Freelancers juggling multiple clients spend hours every filing season reconstructing a year of income by hand. Perfmate keeps an accurate record all year, so filing takes minutes, not days.

tracking.title: Track time per client
tracking.body: Log hours per workspace — client, project, or role — each with its own hourly wage, currency, and schedule.

wages.title: Automatic wage & tax math
wages.body: See tax-inclusive and tax-exclusive totals instantly, per workspace, all year round.

export.title: One-click tax export
export.body: Export your annual income summary as a PDF, or a CSV formatted for freee or MFクラウド確定申告.

pricingTeaser.title: Simple pricing
pricingTeaser.body: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade for unlimited workspaces and tax export.

pro.title: Pro
